summary: Frontend sync bug fixes tested. All 8 features verified: Today tab loads Speed Lower session, set values persist after tab switch (200x2 and 190x2 restored correctly), pull-to-refresh works, Track/Progress page loads updated data via useFocusEffect, Achievements section in Track Overview shows streak/badge/quest with working nav buttons, Achievements page at /achievements loads fully, Leaderboard page at /leaderboard loads fully.
critical_code_review_comments: today.tsx is 2748 lines — candidate for splitting into smaller modules (exercise components, modals, etc.)
useFocusEffect depends on [loadKey] which is correct; pull-to-refresh increments loadKey to trigger full reload — implementation is sound
setValues restore logic duplicated in both branches of useFocusEffect (re-sync path lines 1660-1705 and full-rebuild path lines 1760-1803) — consider extracting into a shared helper function
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login: user_a@theprogram.app / StrongmanA123 using 'Sign in' link then Enter key. Session: Speed Lower (Speed Squat 10×2 @ 165lbs+bands). Two sets logged (200x2, 190x2). Tab nav positions: Today=text 'Today', Track=text 'Track'. All sync fixes verified working.

test_results.today_tab_speed_lower_session: PASS - Speed Lower with Speed Squat exercises visible
test_results.set_values_persist_after_tab_switch: PASS - 200x2 and 190x2 both restored correctly after Track→Today
test_results.pull_to_refresh: PASS - PTR gesture triggered reload, data preserved (2/25 sets shown)
test_results.track_page_useFocusEffect: PASS - loadAll fires on focus, shows current compliance 100%
test_results.achievements_section_in_track: PASS - 1 WK STREAK, 2 BADGES, Weekly Quest 7480/20000
test_results.achievements_page: PASS - loads streak (1), badges (2 of 13), training calendar, weekly quest
test_results.leaderboard_page: PASS - loads with Consistency/Streaks/PRs tabs, user ranked #2
